# D3keyHelperForLinux v1.0.2

This release focuses on interface localization and toolbar polish.

## Highlights

- Added GUI localization support for Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and English.
- Added automatic and manual language selection for the main window.
- Moved language switching into the toolbar for faster access.
- Replaced the language combo box with compact segmented toggle buttons.
- Reduced toolbar path-label footprint and fixed clipping around the language selector.
- Polished combo box styling, including popup borders, arrow styling, and popup edge rendering.

## Notes

- Existing configs remain compatible.
- The default UI language can still be resolved automatically, while users can switch language manually from the toolbar.
- This release keeps the AppImage packaging flow unchanged.

## 中文摘要

- 新增简体中文、繁体中文和英文界面本地化。
- 新增自动/手动界面语言选择。
- 将语言切换入口移动到顶部工具栏。
- 用紧凑分段按钮替代语言下拉框。
- 优化工具栏宽度和语言控件裁切问题。
- 调整下拉框、弹出列表边框和箭头样式。
